input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
# Quick scan of March 1 articles for key war details
with open('articles/2026/03/01/articles.jsonl') as f:
    for line in f:
        a = json.loads(line)
        title = (a.get('title','') or '').lower()
        content = (a.get('content','') or '').lower()[:2000]
        # Look for specific details from ongoing war
        kw_checks = [
            ('hezbollah', 'hezbollah' in title and ('attack' in content[:500] or 'rocket' in content[:500])),
            ('kharg island', 'kharg' in title or 'kharg island' in content[:500]),
            ('ceasefire', 'ceasefire' in title or 'pause' in title or 'truce' in title),
            ('adnoc', 'adnoc' in content[:500] or 'abu dhabi oil' in content[:500]),
            ('airline', ('airline' in title and ('suspend' in content[:500] or 'halt' in content[:500])) or ('emirates' in title and 'flight' in content[:500])),
        ]
        for label, match in kw_checks:
            if match:
                print(f'[{label}] {(a.get(\"title\",\"\") or \"\")[:120]}')
                print(f'  {(a.get(\"content\",\"\") or \"\")[:300]}')
                print()
                break
" 2>/dev/null | head -40
